decisions.title: Keep the first release local-first
decisions.detail: Local-first is a core differentiator and should not be weakened casually.

observations.summary: Release 1 import boundary is still unresolved
observations.detail: The spec now makes portability non-core for Release 1, but automatic deadline import remains an important unresolved boundary because it pulls against low-friction, offline, and trust constraints.

issues.title: Unclear portability story
issues.detail: The source material hints at portability and reminders, but the release constraints are stricter.

concerns.title: Do not turn synthesis into note-dumping
concerns.detail: The deliverables should stay deliberate and readable, not just copy all source material.

session.summary: Completed Session 1 synthesis for Northstar Desk. PRODUCT_SPEC.md now defines a narrow Release 1 posture around local-first weekly recovery on one primary device, and it surfaces the main unresolved tensions without pretending they are solved.
session.nextStep: Resume from Forge state, use the clarified Release 1 scope to draft ARCHITECTURE_PLAN.md and RISK_REGISTER.md, and keep the portability and deadline-import tensions explicit rather than smoothing them over.
